team.name: Raz
team.description: Founder and final decision maker for Warung Kerja.
team.mission: Set direction, approve priorities, and keep the whole team aligned.
team.activity: Reviewing team structure and Mission Control live state

team.name: Baro
team.description: Primary creative and strategic agent leading a cluster of specialist subagents.
team.mission: Direct research, trends, ops, and creative execution across active work.
team.activity: Coordinating active projects and delegated specialist work

subAgents.name: Bob
subAgents.description: Research specialist focused on market intelligence and validation.
subAgents.mission: Find useful signals, opportunities, risks, and evidence quickly.

subAgents.name: Lin
subAgents.description: Trend scout scanning communities and social signals.
subAgents.mission: Surface fresh patterns, keywords, and cultural shifts.
subAgents.activity: Scanning for trend and community signals

subAgents.name: SOBA
subAgents.description: Lightweight operations specialist for mechanical and admin tasks.
subAgents.mission: Handle precise operational tasks quickly and cleanly.
subAgents.activity: Standing by for file, status, and ops tasks

subAgents.name: Haji
subAgents.description: Creative execution specialist for design, writing, and assets.
subAgents.mission: Turn creative direction into finished output.
subAgents.activity: Ready for creative briefs and asset work

team.name: Noona
team.description: Engineering lead responsible for shipping, technical direction, and implementation review.
team.mission: Build and ship systems that make the whole team faster.
team.activity: Updating Mission Control to match the canonical team roster

subAgents.name: Jen
subAgents.description: Junior implementation support for low-risk engineering work.
subAgents.mission: Handle scoped coding tasks under Noona’s review.
subAgents.activity: Standing by for delegated coding work

team.name: Obey
team.description: Independent synthesis partner turning raw research into patterns, messaging, and strategy.
team.mission: Distill signals into clear synthesis, positioning, and strategic insight.
team.activity: Available for synthesis and strategic distillation

hierarchy: Raz → Baro (Bob, Lin, SOBA, Haji) • Noona (Jen) • Obey
mission: Warung Kerja Mission Control: a shared dashboard for current team state, project tracking, and execution visibility.
